title: microula ciliaris
intro: Microula ciliaris, also known as Himalayan microula, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microula ciliaris include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Microula ciliaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
